studyName: Somatic Genome Dynamics of Barrett's Esophagus Patients with Non-Cancer and Cancer Outcomes

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes case control status of subject for progression/nonprogression to esophageal adenocarcinoma, demographic information (self-reported sex, race, and age at various timepoints during the study), age at baseline endoscopy and most recent endoscopy, count of unique point mutations and indels across all four T1 and T2 biopsies per patient, age at death or age confirmed alive, genetic and physical indicators for risk of progression at various timepoints (maximum histopathologic diagnosis, maximum TP53 abnormality, Barrett's segment length measurements, maximum count of SNVs, maximum count of indels, detection of whole genome doubled, maximum load of somatic chromosomal abnormalities, maximum count of structural variants, distance of incisors to ora serrata, distance from incisors to the gastroesophageal junction), time elapsed between timepoints (n=2 variables; between T1 and T2, between T1 and T3).

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for nonprogression or progression to esophageal adenocarcinoma outcome

variables.name: AGE_ALIVE
variables.description: Known Age confirmed alive in cohort study as of April 2019

variables.name: AGE_BASELINE
variables.description: Age at baseline endoscopy in cohort study

variables.name: AGE_DEATH
variables.description: Known Age at death in cohort study as of April 2019

variables.name: AGE_EA_DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Age at diagnosis of esophageal adenocarcinoma (EA)

variables.name: AGE_LAST
variables.description: Age at last endoscopy in cohort study

variables.name: AGE_T1
variables.description: Age at first timepoint TI in case control study

variables.name: AGE_T2
variables.description: Age at second timepoint T2 in case control study

variables.name: AGE_T3
variables.description: Age at third timepoint T3

variables.name: BE_SEGMENT_T1
variables.description: Barrett's segment length  measured  between the ora serrata and the gastroesophageal junction  at T1

variables.name: BE_SEGMENT_T2
variables.description: Barrett's segment length  measured  between the ora serrata and the gastroesophageal junction  at T2

variables.name: BE_SEGMENT_T3
variables.description: Barrett's segment length  measured  between the ora serrata and the gastroesophageal junction  at T3

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_BASELINE
variables.description: Maximum histopathologic diagnosis at baseline in cohort study

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_LAST
variables.description: Maximum histopathologic diagnosis at last endoscopy in cohort study

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_MAX_EVER
variables.description: Maximum histopathologic diagnosis ever in cohort study

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_T1
variables.description: Maximum histopathologic diagnosis at T1 in case control study

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_T2
variables.description: Maximum histopathologic diagnosis at T2 in case control study

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_T3
variables.description: Maximum histopathologic diagnosis at T3 in case control study

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Self-reported race

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Self-reported sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: T1_GEJ
variables.description: Distance from incisors to the gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) T1

variables.name: T1_MaxOftotal_Indel_cnt
variables.description: Maximum count of indels at timepoint T1

variables.name: T1_MaxOftotal_SNV_cnt
variables.description: Maximum count of SNVs at timepoint T1

variables.name: T1_Max_Mbp_SCA
variables.description: Maximum load of somatic chromosomal abnormalities (SCA) in Mbp at T1

variables.name: T1_Max_SV_total
variables.description: Maximum count of structural variants (SV) at T1

variables.name: T1_Max_TP53hit
variables.description: Maximum TP53 abnormality detected at timepoint T1

variables.name: T1_OS
variables.description: Distance from incisors to ora serrata (OS) or squamocolumnar junction at T1

variables.name: T1_WGD
variables.description: Detection of a whole genome doubled biopsy at timepoint T1

variables.name: T2_GEJ
variables.description: Distance from incisors to the gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) T2

variables.name: T2_MaxOftotal_Indel_cnt
variables.description: Maximum count of indels at timepoint T2

variables.name: T2_MaxOftotal_SNV_cnt
variables.description: Maximum count of SNVs at timepoint T2

variables.name: T2_Max_Mbp_SCA
variables.description: Maximum load of somatic chromosomal abnormalities (SCA) in Mbp at T2

variables.name: T2_Max_SV_total
variables.description: Maximum count of structural variants (SV) at T2

variables.name: T2_Max_TP53hit
variables.description: Maximum TP53 abnormality detected at timepoint T2

variables.name: T2_OS
variables.description: Distance from incisors to ora serrata (OS) or squamocolumnar junction at T2

variables.name: T2_WGD
variables.description: Detection of a whole genome doubled biopsy at timepoint T2

variables.name: T3_GEJ
variables.description: Distance from incisors to the gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) T3

variables.name: T3_OS
variables.description: Distance from incisors to ora serrata (OS) or squamocolumnar junction at T3

variables.name: Unique_ByPatient_Count_SNV+Indel
variables.description: Count of unique point mutations and indels across all four T1 and T2 biopsies per patient

variables.name: YEARS_T1_T2
variables.description: Time between timepoint T1 and T2

variables.name: YEARS_T1_T3
variables.description: Time between timepoint T1 and T3, subset of 10 NP controls with long follow up

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes the body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, tissue type, paired normal control sample ID, patient age at time of sample collection, distance from gastroesophageal junction from which sample was collected, and sequencing center.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where biopsies were collected

variables.name: CM_DISTANCE_FROM_GEJ
variables.description: Centimeter distance in the esophagus that sample was collected relative to the gastroesophageal junction

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Tissue type

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: PAIRED_NORMAL
variables.description: Sample ID of the normal control sample used in paired normal:BE sample analyses

variables.name: PATIENT_AGE_AT_SAMPLING_TIME
variables.description: Patient age in years at time of sample collection

variables.name: SAMPLE_CATEGORY
variables.description: Sample classification including timepoint

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center that performed the whole genome sequencing

tables.description: This subject consent data table contains subject IDs and consent group information.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
